This is the product launch script and you see here this takes you through a four video sequence To launch one of your new products now if you ever seen the big typical internet marketing style launch This is the script behind how we and how most of the marketers do these product launches Video number one is your wow and how video number two is your transformational education Number three is your ownership experience number four is your offer and this trip is going to walk you through exactly how we Structure every single one of these videos
